posts.text: Annual Report FY26 Notes ( Link ) : Company has an orderbook of 551 Cr as on Q1FY26 - Includes orders across submarine refit and systems programmes (HDW SSK, Kalvari class P75 Scorpene), surface combatant programmes (P17A Nilgiri, P15B Visakhapatnam, ASW Corvette), and sonar systems production for various Ships. What they delivered on FY26: image 721×456 179 KB Naval programme pipeline: image 940×232 83.8 KB image 940×395 141 KB CFF’s order pipeline: image 828×619 154 KB P75I Programme : MDL (partnered with TKMS) will be doing 6 subs, will be awarded in FY27.
